common.noPermissions: You do not have the necessary permissions.

tenants.title: Tenant Management
tenants.noPermissions: You do not have permission to view tenants.

createDialog.title: Create New Tenant
createDialog.description: Add a new organization to the system

agenciesDialog.title: Manage Agencies for {{name}}
agenciesDialog.description: Assign or unassign agencies to this tenant
agenciesDialog.assignedEmpty: No agencies assigned to this tenant yet.
agenciesDialog.availableEmpty: All agencies are assigned to a tenant.

confirm.suspend: Suspend this tenant? All agencies and users under this tenant will lose access.
confirm.delete: Permanently delete this tenant? This action cannot be undone. Make sure it has no agencies or users assigned.

agencies.title: Agency Management
agencies.subtitle: Create and manage agencies
agencies.noPermissions: You do not have permission to manage agencies.

createDialog.title: Create New Agency
createDialog.description: Add a new agency to the system
createDialog.phonesHint: Separate multiple phone numbers with commas

confirm.suspend: Suspend this agency? Users will lose access.
confirm.delete: Permanently delete this agency? This action cannot be undone. Make sure it has no users or leads assigned.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Create and manage system users
users.noPermissions: You do not have permission to manage users.

tooltips.ownerOnly: Only OWNER can edit OWNER users

createDialog.title: Create New User
createDialog.description: Add a new user to the system
createDialog.superAdminHint: SUPERADMIN users belong to the tenant, not to a specific agency
createDialog.ownerHint: OWNER users can optionally belong to a tenant, but not to a specific agency
createDialog.superAdminTenantHint: Assign SUPERADMIN to a tenant to manage its agencies and users

editDialog.title: Edit User
editDialog.ownerOnlyWarning: ⚠️ Only users with OWNER role can change another OWNER's role

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
